researchGroundingLatestPass: 2026-06-15 deep research pass plus v0.71-v0.103.0 implementation evidence: experiment registry, replay planning, corpus hygiene, candidate quarantine, verifier checks, recipes, constraint-first promotion, transformer responsibility surfaces, checkpoint/eval surfaces, profile anti-collapse pressure, baseline-floor update guards, adaptive and repair-shaped retries, floor diagnostics, source-profile stabilization, profile-scale memory, diversity/frontier/coverage recovery, branch-stable and branch-diversity recovery, collapsed-profile binding, and remaining-profile binding evidence.
researchGroundingDecision: QuarkLM should model self-improvement as a closed-loop lifecycle with ledgered admission, verified selection, auditable weight optimization, separate inference rails, and promotion gates that can reject regressions.
researchGroundingNext: v0.103.0 adds remaining-profile binding after collapsed-profile binding; next objective work should preserve the new learning coverage gain while separating owner and paraphrases from the remaining collapse without weakening coverage floors.
openSourceMechanicsAudit: MECHANICS_AUDIT.md and sites/docs/docs/learn/open-source-mechanics-audit.md added as the v0.66 deeper comparison of open-source LLM, tokenizer, continual-learning, transparency, and self-improvement mechanics.
openSourceMechanicsAuditDecision: The next bottleneck is trainer mechanics, not another global branch-loss term: direct-answer replay should be profile-aware, artifacted, coverage-constrained, and tested for profile isolation before the next full-stack repair run.
openSourceMechanicsAuditNext: v0.103.0 adds remaining-profile binding after collapsed-profile binding, records 21 prioritized attempts, accepts 6 prioritized updates, improves learning coverage from 0.0 to 0.25, preserves target coverage, and still rejects promotion on branch diversity; the next repair should target owner and paraphrases while preserving learning.
forwardResearchPlan: FORWARD_RESEARCH_PLAN.md and sites/docs/docs/learn/forward-research-plan.md added as the v0.69 cross-referenced implementation strategy.
forwardResearchPlanDecision: Pause direct-answer objective churn until QuarkLM has the self-improvement operating system needed to decide which training changes are legitimate: experiment registry, replay extraction, corpus governance, candidate quarantine, closed-world verifier checks, recipe boundaries, and constraint-first promotion gates.
forwardResearchPlanNext: v0.103.0 adds remaining-profile binding after safe profile updates, accepts 6 prioritized updates that improve learning coverage without coverage regression, and still rejects promotion on branch diversity; the next repair should focus on owner and paraphrases while preserving the learning gain.
deepResearchReview: DEEP_RESEARCH_REVIEW.md and sites/docs/docs/learn/deep-research-review.md added as the v0.70 deeper cross-referenced research and implementation-gap review.
deepResearchReviewDecision: No larger transformer repair screen should run until experiment intent, corpus plans, replay plans, verifier checks, recipes, and constraint-first promotion are explicit artifacts.
deepResearchReviewNext: v0.71-v0.103.0 now cover experiment intent, replay planning, corpus hygiene, verifier checks, recipes, constraint-first promotion, transformer responsibility surfaces, checkpoint/eval surfaces, profile target-share pressure, baseline replay anchors, update guards, adaptive retries, repair retries, floor anchors, rejection diagnostics, source-profile stabilization, profile-scale memory, diversity-aware acceptance, frontier/coverage recovery, branch-stable recovery, branch-diversity recovery, collapsed-profile binding, and remaining-profile binding; next objective work should target owner and paraphrases without weakening the floor.
researchImplementationMap: RESEARCH_IMPLEMENTATION_MAP.md and sites/docs/docs/learn/research-implementation-map.md added as the v0.74 source-to-gap-to-version implementation map.
researchImplementationMapDecision: Deep cross-referenced research and open-source mechanics review are now a required implementation control: each next mechanic should cite its research pattern, name the closed-world boundary it protects, and produce acceptance evidence.
researchImplementationMapNext: Candidate quarantine through remaining-profile binding are implemented and screened through v0.103.0; target owner and paraphrases while preserving the v0.103.0 learning coverage gain.
experimentRegistry: src/closed_world_lm/experiment_registry.py and sites/docs/docs/operate/experiment-registry.md added as the v0.71 run-intent implementation.
experimentRegistryDecision: Self-improvement and transformer answer-training runs now declare hypothesis, allowed data, planned artifacts, recipe id, acceptance gates, failure criteria, notes, and final decision before their outputs are trusted as evidence.
experimentRegistryNext: Use the registry as the required evidence wrapper for replay, corpus, verifier, recipe, and promotion-gate mechanics.
replayPlanning: src/closed_world_lm/replay_plan.py added as the v0.72 standalone replay-planning module.
replayPlanningDecision: Transformer training still uses the existing profile-aware replay behavior, but replay record normalization, profile grouping, coverage floors, missing-target summaries, and JSON-safe plan shape now live outside the transformer monolith.
replayPlanningNext: Use standalone replay planning as input to corpus hygiene, candidate quarantine, verifier, recipe, and promotion-gate reports.

corpusHygieneDecision: Self-improvement and transformer answer-training runs now write corpus_hygiene.json and training_plan.json with source mixtures, duplicate checks, train/eval prompt overlap, candidate ratios, rare-profile coverage, allowed data sources, planned artifacts, and replay-plan summaries when available.
corpusHygieneNext: Use candidate ratios, quarantine summaries, overlap evidence, verifier summaries, recipe summaries, transformer responsibility surfaces, checkpoint metadata surfaces, and eval surfaces as inputs to objective-repair work.

candidateQuarantineDecision: Self-improvement and transformer answer-training runs now write candidate_quarantine.json, and training_plan.json records that candidate records are not training data until admitted into the ledgered corpus and converted into curriculum lessons.
candidateQuarantineNext: Use the candidate quarantine manifest as input to deterministic verifier checks, recipe artifacts, and future promotion gates.

closedWorldVerifierDecision: Self-improvement and transformer answer-training runs now write closed_world_verifier.json, embed verifier summaries in training_plan.json, and require verifier approval as a run-intent gate without using an external model.
closedWorldVerifierNext: Use verifier evidence as an input to recipe objects, constraint-first promotion gates, transformer responsibility surfaces, model/checkpoint metadata, eval surfaces, and objective-repair work.

trainingRecipeDecision: Self-improvement and transformer answer-training runs now write training_recipe.json and constraint_first_promotion.json. Transformer decisions cannot promote from loss, NLL, rank, top-k, or exact quality evidence unless closed-world constraints pass first.
trainingRecipeNext: Use recipe and constraint-first artifacts as the surfaces for transformer objective-repair work.

transformerResponsibilityDecision: Transformer answer-training now keeps artifact contracts, experiment intent, recipe creation, promotion decisions, JSONL snapshot writing, shuffled training cursors, loss averaging, and the direct-answer objective catalog behind narrow tested surfaces while preserving the public CLI.
transformerResponsibilityNext: Use the v0.78 responsibility surfaces through the v0.103.0 remaining-profile binding evidence before another objective repair.

transformerModelNext: Use model/checkpoint metadata surfaces with the v0.103.0 remaining-profile binding evidence before another objective repair.

transformerEvalDecision: Checkpoint payload loading and identity validation, checkpoint summaries, probe loading, candidate collection, generic transformer scoring, eval report assembly, samples JSONL writing, and eval JSON writing now live outside transformer_char_model.py while preserving CLI behavior and artifact shapes.

transformerProfileTargetShareDecision: Profile-aware replay can now add balanced owned target-share pressure across each profile's replay targets while retaining deficit focus, represented-target preservation, replay-plan artifacts, and recipe/promotion surfaces.
